title: geum divergens
intro: Geum divergens, also known as diverging avens or western avens, is a flowering plant species native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum divergens include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
